productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Blue Top
description: Composition Blue sleeveless top made of 100% viscose, has a racerback, halter-neck with a two-button keyhole detail at the back and a ruffle along the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Ruffly, girly and summery, this top from united colors of benetton is a must-have in your off-duty wardrobe this season! Style this tucked in with pencil skirts or hanging out over slinky jeggins. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
